# mailgun_templates (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all templates for a Mailgun domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to list templates for.

### Read-Only

- `templates` (Attributes List) List of templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--templates))
- `total_count` (Number) The total number of templates found.

<a id="nestedatt--templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `templates`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the template was created.
- `description` (String) The description of the template.
- `name` (String) The name of the template.
- `version_active` (Boolean) Whether the version is active.
- `version_engine` (String) The templating engine used (handlebars or go).
- `version_tag` (String) The tag of the active template version.
